name: ETH Session Drive Continuation v1
thesis: ETH 1h can sustain directional follow-through when an impulse hour establishes structure and the next hour holds rather than fully mean reverting. The edge should come from session-drive continuation with broad structural hold, not fragile single-bar breakout grammar.
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward testing shows zero trades on valid data, weak blind-window participation, or no post-cost edge.

long: Time-based de-risk after 3 bars if unrealized gain < 0.45 * ATR_14
short: Time-based de-risk after 3 bars if unrealized gain < 0.45 * ATR_14
